warning: Modern notation can make earlier mathematics appear less sophisticated than it was.
mitigation: Separate reconstructed algebraic structure from original notation and reasoning.

warning: Notation history can be reduced to European symbolic algebra.
mitigation: Include Indian, Chinese, Islamic, Mesopotamian, Egyptian, Greek, and other traditions.

warning: Compact notation can make meaning opaque for learners.
mitigation: Teach notation as meaningful structure, not decoration.

warning: Symbolic transformations can hide domain restrictions and nonzero assumptions.
mitigation: State domains, operations, and valid transformation conditions.

warning: Mathematical equality and programming assignment are easily confused.
mitigation: Distinguish equality, identity, definition, assignment, and comparison operators.

warning: Symbolic simplification can be treated as interpretation or proof without assumption checks.
mitigation: Audit assumptions, domains, branch cuts, and expression equivalence conditions.
